---
name: Accessibility correction
about: A pattern or example in the skill is incorrect and could introduce an accessibility regression
title: "[Correction] "
labels: correction, accessibility
assignees: ''
---

> If this issue could meaningfully harm downstream users (for example, if the pattern is widely copied and would degrade the experience for assistive-technology users), please contact the maintainer privately via the email on their GitHub profile in addition to (or instead of) filing this issue.

## What is incorrect

<!-- Which file, section, or pattern contains the problem. Quote the specific lines if helpful. -->

## Why it is incorrect

<!-- Explain the failure mode. Cite an authoritative source (W3C WCAG, WAI-ARIA spec, MDN, vendor docs, screen-reader vendor documentation) wherever possible. -->

## Affected users

<!-- Which class of users would experience the regression? (e.g., "screen-reader users on NVDA", "keyboard-only users", "users with low vision relying on browser zoom", "users with motor impairments using switch controls"). -->

## Suggested correction

<!-- How the pattern or guidance should read instead. -->

## References
